'''Hoth: Under the Ice''' was an article series published as part of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' web feature on [[Wizards.com]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published in [[December]] [[2003]], detailing the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: Snowflake Base===
''…[[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] make the [[Death/Legends|fatal]] mistake of thinking they've found the perfect hideout.''<ref name="Hoth" />

===Part 2: Steady, Girl===
''…[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] arrive on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] and carve out the tunnels that will become [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].''<ref name="Hoth" />

===Part 3: Merchants of Death===
''…a [[Arns Grimraker|pirate captain]] encounters the [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|last Rebel hero]] on Hoth.''<ref name="Hoth" />

===Part 4: A Brief Thaw===
''…[[Kyle Katarn]] and his apprentice investigate a [[Disturbance in the Force/Legends|Force disturbance]] at the deserted Echo base.''<ref name="Hoth" />
